LanguageData.ABY_InfernalCombatFrame.label: infernal combat frame
LanguageData.ABY_InfernalCombatFrame.description: A first-generation abyssal torso frame built as the body counterpart to the rift helm. Layered plasteel ribs, residue-lined plating and a sealed chest-core lattice make it durable enough for breach warfare without turning the wearer into dead weight.
